title: Calories Burned Walking Uphill (Incline Walking Burn Chart)
introduction: Walking uphill can dramatically increase calorie burn without the joint impact of running. Here is how incline level changes calories burned, plus a practical chart by body weight.

sections.heading: ⛰️ Quick Answer: Incline Walking Burns More
sections.content:
At the same speed, uphill walking often burns 20-60% more calories than flat walking.

| Incline Level | Typical MET | 150 lb (68 kg) | 180 lb (82 kg) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 0% (flat) | 3.5-4.3 | 240-300 kcal/hr | 290-360 kcal/hr |
| 3% | 5.0-5.5 | 340-380 kcal/hr | 410-460 kcal/hr |
| 6% | 6.0-7.0 | 410-480 kcal/hr | 490-580 kcal/hr |
| 10% | 8.0-9.0 | 550-620 kcal/hr | 660-740 kcal/hr |

Use the [Calorie Burn Calculator](/tools/calorie-burn-calculator) for your exact incline and duration.

sections.heading: How to Set Incline Safely
sections.content:
| Training Level | Recommended Incline Start | Session Length |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Beginner | 1-3% | 15-25 min |
| Intermediate | 3-6% | 20-35 min |
| Advanced | 6-10% intervals | 25-45 min |

Keep posture tall, avoid holding rails, and reduce incline if form breaks down.

sections.heading: Uphill Walking for Fat Loss
sections.content:
Why incline walking works:

• Higher energy expenditure per minute
• Strong glute and posterior-chain demand
• Lower impact than running for many people

Pair incline sessions with a controlled calorie intake and protein-focused meals.

sections.heading: Track the Right Metrics
sections.content:
Focus on trends instead of one workout:

| Metric | Target |
| --- | --- |
| Weekly sessions | 3-5 |
| Avg incline progression | +1% every 2-3 weeks (if tolerated) |
| Weekly weight trend | Downward over 2-4 weeks |

Use Eati to track both intake and workouts, so you can see if uphill sessions are moving your fat-loss trend.

midArticleCta: Estimate your incline walking calories with the calculator, then monitor your food and training consistency in Eati.
conclusion: Walking uphill is one of the most efficient low-impact ways to burn more calories. Use realistic incline settings, stay consistent, and combine your burn estimate with meal tracking in Eati for better long-term results.
metaTitle: Calories Burned Walking Uphill: Incline Chart by Weight
metaDescription: See calories burned walking uphill by incline percentage and body weight. Learn how to use incline walking for fat loss safely and effectively.

faqs.question: What incline burns the most calories on a treadmill?
faqs.answer: Higher inclines generally burn more, but the best incline is the highest level you can maintain with good walking form and no pain.

faqs.question: Is uphill walking better than running for fat loss?
faqs.answer: Both can work well. Uphill walking may be easier to recover from and sustain consistently, which often improves long-term fat-loss adherence.
